right_reference_number.definition: A unique number identifying a right.
right_reference_number.how_to_record: May include: a prefix to distinguish it from other reference numbers; the year; and a running number.
right_reference_number.use: Record once only for a right.

right_type.definition: The specific type of right being recorded in relation to an object, reproduction, or text.
right_type.how_to_record: Use a single term, without punctuation or capitalisation. Maintain a list of standard terms.
right_type.use: Record once only for each type of right residing in an item.

right_holder.definition: The holder of the right associated with an object, reproduction, or text.
right_holder.how_to_record: It will be necessary to use several units of information, including, for example, a surname, a forename and an address. The descriptions for these information units are gathered together under the People, Person or Organisation headings as appropriate.
examples: See under People, Person or Organisation as appropriate.
right_holder.use: More than one Right holder can be recorded, if the rights are jointly held.

right_holders_contact.definition: The Organisation or Person designated by the Right holder to be responsible for dealing with rights on their behalf.
right_holders_contact.how_to_record: It will be necessary to use several units of information, including, for example, a surname and a forename. The descriptions for these information units are gathered together under the Organisation or Person heading. You should have standard forms of names for use.
right_holders_contact.use: Record once only for a Right holder.

right_begin_date.definition: The first date on which a right is current.
right_begin_date.how_to_record: Always record the day, month and year in the same order. Always use the same character to separate each component. Always give all four digits for the year.
right_begin_date.use: Record once only for a right.

right_end_date.definition: The last date on which a right is current.
right_end_date.how_to_record: Always record the day, month and year in the same order. Always use the same character to separate each component. Always give all four digits for the year.
right_end_date.use: Record once only for a right.

right_note.definition: Any details of the right not covered elsewhere.
right_note.how_to_record: Use normal spelling and punctuation. Record, for example, the copyright status of the original painting, where the organisation holds copyright of a photograph of it.
examples: Organisation holds right to use the photograph for its internal purposes only. Copyright for the original painting belongs to artist.
right_note.use: Record once only for an object.
